mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sre_info ( goods, attr, unit, warehouse, batch, mfd, price, nums, serial, discount, dsc, total, tax, tat, tpt, data ) VALUES
( #{item.goods}, #{item.attr}, #{item.unit}, #{item.warehouse}, #{item.batch}, #{item.mfd}, #{item.price}, #{item.nums}, #{item.serial}, #{item.discount}, #{item.dsc}, #{item.total}, #{item.tax}, #{item.tat}, #{item.tpt}, #{item.data} )
mapper.select: select id, pid, goods, attr, unit, warehouse, batch, mfd, price, nums, serial, discount, dsc, total, tax, tat, tpt, data from sre_info order by id limit #{start},#{batchSize}
